case_title: KUEHL, PETER F. vs. WASHINGTON, DONNA MARIE

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT WASHINGTON, DONNA MARIE
